title: Implement RuntimeHealthMonitor
description: Create guardrail that monitors runtime performance and detects memory leaks, gradual slowdown, and resource exhaustion. Runs code in sandbox and measures memory growth, frame rate stability over 30 seconds.
verifyCommand: npm run build && npm test -- src/core/RuntimeHealthMonitor.test.ts
testCases: Code with growing array (memory leak) → Should FAIL after 30s
Code with object pooling → Should PASS
